description: Close accountable human evidence, mapping, source-rights and dashboard review gates.

gates.evidence: The final deduplicated expansion_v7 frame contains 1,500 unique groups at SHA-256 630ea737a420486a5204660789284ffbff6a1f353e36e779f31fe1dd41646a22. Two isolated reviews are complete (77.47% agreement; Cohen's kappa 0.544). Independent proposal SHA-256 7e6e2d1e383dfbd49d4066bb9dbd87a971c0a556ef2ad69a21fb0fc776a986d8 yields 462 positive, 1,033 negative and 5 excluded cases but leaves 83 procedure/pathology and 27 device positive cases missing. No split or holdout was exposed. Authoritative positive crosswalk evidence or accountable domain adjudication is required; quotas cannot be waived.

Reviewed RxNorm CPC, CMS ASP/PFS/HCPCS Level II, HPO and openFDA bundles produce the separately frozen 1,500-case expansion_v2 frame at SHA-256 29b357cb20ee2328bb995e733b71075f549703a46f0b62e8a31c0a052a25916c with no structural family gap. Restricted terminology remains optional local enrichment.
The current checksum-bound ledger validates 194 approved decisions. CMS/MBS/PBS/HCPCS restrictions remain explicit; Apache-2.0 applies only to project code and metadata.

The commit-bound automated packet covers 44 browser tests and 36 screenshot hashes against commit 591d84a1b5c4dd7d703414562c1fe2082dd7ef32; scoped accountable human review remains pending and automated evidence is not universal WCAG certification.
